title: Seedance 3.0 — NEW AI Video Generator Makes 1H+ Movies
summary: Seedance 3.0 is a leaked AI video generation model claimed to produce 18-minute movies from single prompts with features including Narrative Memory Chain, MMDiT v2 upgrade, and 8x price reduction. The video fact-checks seven claims from the leak, verifying three while disputing three others.
